themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, interact with tools, and collaborate.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that help developers write, debug, and understand code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles detailing AI capabilities in condensing large amounts of text into concise summaries, useful for research and insights.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: General discussion and lists of AI-powered tools designed to aid in various aspects of user research.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Content exploring how AI analyzes and interprets user feedback, opinions, and emotions from text or other data sources.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles focused on the research, development, and implications of AI chatbots, including their capabilities and limitations.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: How AI is being applied to product management tasks, including strategy, roadmap development, and conflict resolution.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Content on using AI to automate or enhance the process of testing the usability of products and designs.

themes.name: AI design research
themes.description: Articles discussing how AI is influencing and being used within the design process for UX and product development.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Research and discussion on how AI affects jobs, employment, and the skills needed in the modern workforce.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
